title: Koroye
summary: Portfolio platform for Keniye Koroye, an industrial designer, researcher, product strategist, and innovation leader.
shortDescription: A digital platform showcasing multidisciplinary design, research, and innovation work.

overview: A digital platform for industrial designer, researcher, and product strategist Keniye Koroye.
The objective was to create a portfolio that reflected multidisciplinary work across design, innovation, and research.
challenges: The website needed to present several disciplines without overwhelming visitors.
Research, industrial design, strategy, and innovation all needed equal importance.
approach: Used strong typography and visual hierarchy.
Built an editorial layout that could support multiple types of work.
outcome: The platform successfully showcases multidisciplinary work through a clear and engaging experience.
caseStudy.pullQuote: The experience had to give equal weight to design, research, strategy, and innovation.

interactionPreview.label: Interaction preview
interactionPreview.caption: A short preview of the Koroye website experience.
